executionHistory.summary: Filed BUG-061-002 (ml/app/processor.py:178 ValueError on partial LLM payloads — short text + light/metadata tier). Reproduced in-process with patched litellm.acompletion (verbatim stack trace captured, PII-redacted). Replaced hard required_fields loop with setdefault/derive block mirroring existing unavailable-LLM fallback rules + WARN log. Added 2 new adversarial regression tests (test_bug_061_002_short_text_*, test_bug_061_002_empty_content_*) and rewrote the 2 pre-existing test_missing_*_returns_error tests to assert the new contract. Verified all 4 FAIL pre-fix via git-stash isolation. Verified all 4 PASS post-fix. Full ml/ unit suite: 464 passed. Full Go unit suite: all packages OK (no Go code touched). Self-verified pending bubbles.validate certification.
